finance_churn.headline: Finance risk view shows concentration in a small set of renewals due this quarter.
finance_churn.summary_note: Replace this example with the confirmed Finance source, owner, and refresh cadence once Alex P connects the team.

slipped_commentary.summary_note: Sample owner commentary attached. Replace with current-quarter reasons before publishing the monthly pack.
root_cause_bullets: Procurement and legal review are the most common documented slip drivers in this sample overlay.
Several high-value deals moved because customer decision committees pushed approval into the next month.
A smaller set of slips came from internal pricing and packaging resets rather than lost demand.

owner_comments.comment: Customer legal redlines pushed signature into next quarter.
Budget release slipped pending board approval at the client.
Client reduced scope and asked for repricing before final approval.
